parameters.query:
-- Step 1: Try to find supplier by alias
WITH alias_match AS (
  SELECT s.id, s.supplier_code, s.default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers s
  JOIN supplier_aliases sa ON sa.supplier_id = s.id
  WHERE LOWER(sa.alias_name) = LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}')
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 2: Try to find by short_name or code
name_match AS (
  SELECT id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
  FROM suppliers
  WHERE (
    LOWER(short_name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR LOWER(name) ILIKE '%' || LOWER('{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}') || '%'
    OR supplier_code = '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}'
  )
  AND is_active = true
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
  LIMIT 1
),
-- Step 3: Create new if not found
new_supplier AS (
  INSERT INTO suppliers (supplier_code, name, short_name, supplier_type, default_expense_category, is_active)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $json.lieferant_code }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_name_escaped }}',
    '{{ $json.lieferant_typ }}'::supplier_type,
    '{{ $json.expense_category }}'::expense_category,
    true
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM alias_match)
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM name_match)
  ON CONFLICT (supplier_code) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, supplier_code, default_expense_category::text
)
-- Return the matched or created supplier
SELECT 
  COALESCE(am.id, nm.id, ns.id)::text AS supplier_id,
  COALESCE(am.supplier_code, nm.supplier_code, ns.supplier_code) AS supplier_code,
  COALESCE(am.default_expense_category, nm.default_expense_category, ns.default_expense_category) AS default_expense_category,
  CASE 
    WHEN am.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'alias_match'
    WHEN nm.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'name_match'
    ELSE 'created'
  END AS match_type
FROM (SELECT 1) AS dummy
LEFT JOIN alias_match am ON true
LEFT JOIN name_match nm ON true
LEFT JOIN new_supplier ns ON true;

INSERT INTO purchase_invoices (
  id,
  invoice_number,
  supplier_id,
  invoice_date,
  subtotal_net,
  vat_percent,
  expense_category,
  status,
  pdf_storage_path,
  project_id,
  notes,
  payment_iban,
  payment_bic,
  payment_terms_days,
  due_date,
  discount_percent,
  discount_days,
  source_type,
  email_from,
  email_subject,
  email_received_at,
  email_message_id,
  invoice_type,
  project_reference,
  delivery_address
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.invoice_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.rechnung_nummer }}',
  '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.supplier_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.rechnung_datum }}'::date,
  {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.summe_netto }},
  {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.mwst_prozent }},
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.default_expense_category }}', ''), '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.expense_category }}')::expense_category,
  'DRAFT'::purchase_invoice_status,
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.storage_path }}',
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('🔍 Match Project').first().json.project_id }}', ''), 'undefined')::uuid,
  'Automatisch erfasst via Superchat ({{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.extraction_source }}): {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_subject }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.payment_iban }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.payment_bic }}', ''),
  {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.payment_terms_days }},
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.due_date }}'::date,
  {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.discount_percent }},
  {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.discount_days }},
  'SUPERCHAT'::invoice_source_type,
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_from }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_subject }}', ''),
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_received_at }}'::timestamptz,
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.superchat_message_id }}',
  '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.invoice_type }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.project_reference }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.delivery_address }}', '')
)
ON CONFLICT (invoice_number, supplier_id) DO UPDATE SET
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id::text, invoice_number;

INSERT INTO products (
  name,
  supplier_id,
  sku,
  last_price_net_eur,
  last_price_date,
  unit,
  category,
  source,
  source_reference
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.description }}',
  '{{ $json.supplier_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.product_sku }}',
  {{ $json.unit_price_net }},
  '{{ $json.invoice_date }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.unit }}',
  {{ $json.product_category ? "'" + $json.product_category + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'invoice_import',
  '{{ $json.invoice_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (supplier_id, sku) 
DO UPDATE SET
  last_price_net_eur = EXCLUDED.last_price_net_eur,
  last_price_date = EXCLUDED.last_price_date,
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id::text;

INSERT INTO purchase_invoice_items (
  invoice_id,
  position_number,
  raw_article_number,
  raw_description,
  quantity,
  unit,
  unit_price_net
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.invoice_id }}'::uuid,
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.position_number }},
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.article_number }}',
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.description }}',
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.quantity }},
  '{{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.unit }}',
  {{ $('📦 Split Positions').item.json.unit_price_net }}
)
ON CONFLICT (invoice_id, position_number) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text;

INSERT INTO events (
  project_id, event_type, payload, source_system, source_flow, idempotency_key
) VALUES (
  NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('🔍 Match Project').first().json.project_id }}', ''), 'undefined')::uuid,
  'PURCHASE_INVOICE_CREATED',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'invoice_id', '{{ $('📄 Create Invoice').first().json.id }}',
    'invoice_number', '{{ $('📄 Create Invoice').first().json.invoice_number }}',
    'supplier_id', '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.supplier_id }}',
    'supplier_code', '{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.supplier_code }}',
    'project_id', NULLIF(NULLIF('{{ $('🔍 Match Project').first().json.project_id }}', ''), 'undefined'),
    'storage_path', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.storage_path }}',
    'total_gross', {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.summe_brutto ?? 0 }},
    'expense_category', COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $('🏢 Match Supplier').first().json.default_expense_category }}', ''), '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.expense_category }}'),
    'extraction_source', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.extraction_source }}',
    'email_from', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_from }}',
    'email_subject', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.email_subject }}',
    'positions_count', {{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.positionen_count ?? 0 }},
    'doc_type', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.doc_type }}',
    'invoice_type', '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.invoice_type }}'
  ),
  'n8n',
  'M6_01b_Match_Create',
  'M6_01b_' || '{{ $('📥 Parse Event').first().json.invoice_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id::text;
